description: Context memory across prompts (numeric then string length)

tools.math: Understands natural language arithmetic problems and returns the numeric result as text.
tools.text: Can build simple strings based on instructions.
tools.stringLength: Computes the exact character length of the most recently produced text, avoiding counting mistakes.

prompts: Create the text '<result> items' using the remembered number.
Now use the stringLength tool on the text you just created to compute how many characters are in that text and answer only with the number.
